column1: ちゃんと宿題を終わらせてから遊びに行きなさい。
column2: ちゃんとしゅくだいをおわらせてからあそびにいきなさい。
column3: Finish your homework properly before you go play.
column4: ちゃんと / きちんと (properly / neatly — contrast pair)
column5: ちゃんと + Verb/State (properly, fulfilling expectations) / きちんと + Verb/State (neatly, systematically in order)
column6: ちゃんと = doing something the right/expected way, fulfilling an obligation; きちんと = neatly, meticulously, in a tidy/orderly fashion
column8: ちゃんと = emphasis on meeting expectations; きちんと = emphasis on tidiness/order/precision; しっかり = firmly/thoroughly (reliability)
